title: org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.db
description: This package provides the DBInputFormat, DBRecordReader, and DBWritable classes, which are used to read data from a database table and write data to a database table. The DBInputFormat class is an InputFormat that reads input data from an SQL table, and the DBRecordReader class is a RecordReader that reads records from a SQL table. The DBWritable class is an interface for objects that can be written to and read from a database. The classes in this package are used by the DataDrivenDBInputFormat and DataDrivenDBRecordReader classes, which are subclasses of DBInputFormat and DBRecordReader that implement custom algorithms for dividing a database table into splits. The MySQLDBRecordReader and MySQLDataDrivenDBRecordReader classes are subclasses of DBRecordReader that read records from a MySQL table, and the OracleDBRecordReader and OracleDataDrivenDBRecordReader classes are subclasses of DBRecordReader that read records from an Oracle table.
